title: Operator Reference To Blender Lab MCP Server
citation: Patrick Gidich suggested Blender Lab MCP Server as a candidate OpenClinXR asset-pipeline automation aid on 2026-05-05; recorded in operator-suggestion-backlog.md.
permitted_uses: Planning future local-only Blender MCP evaluation for generated clinical actors, rigging, medical equipment, scene inspection, and adversarial visual QA automation.
claims_supported: The operator identified the Blender Lab MCP Server URL as a candidate technology to evaluate.
The candidate is relevant to asset pipeline automation, generated-equipment workflows, rigging checks, and Blender scene inspection planning.
claims_not_supported: That Codex installed, configured, or successfully ran Blender MCP.
That Blender MCP package version, license, security posture, transport behavior, or local compatibility has been verified.
That Blender MCP is approved for production, CI, remote access, or default verification.
That Blender MCP can replace existing Blender CLI smoke tests or asset-production readiness gates.
